title: Maximum Element After Decreasing and Rearranging
titleCn: 减小和重新排列数组后的最大元素

testcases.input: arr = [2,2,1,2,1] Output: 2 Explanation: We can satisfy the conditions by rearranging arr so it becomes [1,2,2,2,1]. The largest element in arr is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can satisfy the conditions by rearranging arr so it becomes [1,2,2,2,1]. The largest element in arr is 2.

testcases.input: arr = [100,1,1000] Output: 3 Explanation: One possible way to satisfy the conditions is by doing the following: 1. Rearrange arr so it becomes [1,100,1000]. 2. Decrease the value of the second element to 2. 3. Decrease the value of the third element to 3. Now arr = [1,2,3], which satisfies the conditions. The largest element in arr is 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: One possible way to satisfy the conditions is by doing the following: 1. Rearrange arr so it becomes [1,100,1000]. 2. Decrease the value of the second element to 2. 3. Decrease the value of the third element to 3. Now arr = [1,2,3], which satisfies the conditions. The largest element in arr is 3.

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4,5] Output: 5 Explanation: The array already satisfies the conditions, and the largest element is 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The array already satisfies the conditions, and the largest element is 5.
